---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for claude-profiles
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<!-- What pain are you running into? What doesn't the plugin support today
     that you need? Concrete scenarios beat abstract descriptions. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would the UX look like? Sketch the command invocation, the expected
     output, or the behavior. "Could we add X flag to /switch" is fine; so is
     "here's a whole new command" if warranted. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What workarounds have you tried? Why don't they work? -->

## Design-doc alignment

<!-- If you've read `docs/design/phase3-decisions.md`, is your proposal
     compatible with the architectural invariants (§12) and amendments (§13)?
     If you think an invariant needs to change, say so explicitly. -->

## Scope

- [ ] Can this fit in the existing scripts/command layer, or does it need new components?
- [ ] Does it introduce new secret-material handling? (Usually disqualifying in v0.x.)
- [ ] Does it need changes to the JSON schema or sidecar structure?
